3306740.name: Realm of the Mad God: Conqueror's Pack
3306740.description:
Time to take your Realm adventure to the next level! The Conqueror's Pack comes with everything you need to conquer dungeons, earn epic loot, and empower your pet for greater battles. Unleash your potential, dive into exciting challenges, and customize your character with sleek new looks!

This pack contains:
  • 1x Sanctified Ambrosia
  • 1x Superior Mystery Skin
  • 2x Backpack
  • 2x Backpack Extender
  • 1x Potion of Max Level 1
  • 2x Lucky Clover
  • 3x Rare Mystery Key
  • 3x Epic Mystery Key
  • 1x Medium Lime Pulse and Glow Style
  • 1x Yellow Hologram Style
  • 1x High Blue Lightning Flipbook Style

Note: All items will be delivered to your regular Gift Chest (not seasonal) in the game after you buy this pack. Please wait a few minutes and re-launch the game to be able to see them.
3306740.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
